We provide free inspections and detailed estimates with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand all costs before we begin treatment.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Kearny, New Jersey?
faqs.answer: Kearny primarily deals with Eastern Subterranean Termites, which thrive in the area's moist soil conditions near the Passaic River. These termites build colonies underground and cause significant structural damage to wooden components of homes. Our treatments are specifically designed to eliminate subterranean termite colonies and prevent re-infestation.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Kearny homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Kearny are completed within 4-8 hours depending on your property size and treatment method. Liquid treatments typically take one day, while bait station installations may require initial setup followed by monitoring visits over several months. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine while ensuring thorough coverage.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment guarantees for Kearny properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties on all termite treatments in Kearny, typically ranging from 1 to 5 years depending on the service level selected. We stand behind our work with full confidence in our treatment methods.
